BriefBoxes.title: Overview
BriefBoxes.description: I worked on this project as a programmer at Shortgun Games. Roll 'Em Out is a first-person co-op adventure about rolling your friend out of a mysterious cave. The game features a unique rolling mechanic, where players must work together to navigate through challenging environments while they are tied up.

BriefBoxes.title: Technical
BriefBoxes.description:
- TechStack: Unreal Engine, Blueprints, C++
- As a programmer at startup, wore multiple hats, includiong gameplay, UI, networking, animation and more.
- Prominently worked on inventory system, Settings, UI and more.

BriefBoxes.title: The Challenge
BriefBoxes.description: There were several challeneges like time contraint and resources. The game was developed in a short span of 4 months, which required efficient time management and prioritization of tasks. Additionally, the team had to work with limited resources, which meant that we had to be creative and resourceful in our approach to problem-solving.
